name: Loki of Sakaar
description:
Dead Dove tw non-con/dubcon Loki fell from the Rainbow bridge and wound up in Sakaar as a Gladiator. It's a darker world than we saw in Ragnarök and an AU. This is my first bot, feedback appreciated

I see a lot of horny bots where the user is either randomly SA'ed or in an abusive relationship with the bot. Each to their own, but I wanted a take on that where it might kind of be understandable? Not ok or forgiveable of course, but a logical reason for user to still love him (if they choose that route.)
creator: Atilladahoney
